name: Apple MacBook Air 15-inch (M4, 2025)
introText: The MacBook Air 15-inch with M4 offers the same fanless M4 performance as the 13-inch in a larger 15.3" display, ideal for users who work at a desk but want portability without a MacBook Pro premium.
whatWorks: 15.3" display is noticeably more comfortable for extended desk work — the larger screen reduces the need for an external monitor, making it a strong single-device setup for remote workers.
Same M4 chip and battery life as the 13-inch at $300 more — for users who prioritize screen size, the upgrade cost is modest compared to buying a separate monitor.
worthKnowing: Heavier than 13-inch at 1.51kg — still lighter than most 15" Windows laptops, but noticeably bulkier in a bag for daily commutes.
No HDMI or SD card — same port limitation as the 13-inch; a hub is needed for external monitors.

commonComplaints.title: Price jump over 13-inch feels steep
commonComplaints.body: The 15-inch costs $300 more for a larger screen and slightly larger battery — users who mostly use an external monitor say the 13-inch is a better value.

commonComplaints.title: Base 256GB storage insufficient
commonComplaints.body: The same storage concern applies — 256GB fills quickly. Apple's SSD upgrade pricing makes the 512GB model the recommended starting point.

commonComplaints.title: Only two Thunderbolt ports
commonComplaints.body: Two USB-C ports shared between charging, external monitors, and peripherals requires hub management for desk users.

verdict: The MacBook Air 15 M4 is the right choice for users who want a large, comfortable screen with excellent battery life but don't need the MacBook Pro's fan-cooled sustained performance. If you work primarily at a desk, the 13-inch plus an external monitor may be a smarter split — but as a single-device solution, the 15-inch Air is exceptional.

realBuyers.quote: Use it for spreadsheets and video calls all day. The bigger screen makes a real difference — rarely need to connect to a monitor.
Battery lasts all day even with the larger screen. Exactly what I wanted for travel without the MacBook Pro price.
Replaced my 16-inch MacBook Pro. Don't need the extra power, and this is lighter and cheaper. Perfect upgrade path.

sources.title: MacBook Air 15 M4 Review — The Verge

metaDescription: MacBook Air 15 M4 review Canada: 16GB RAM, 15.3" display, 18-hr battery. $1,599 CAD on Amazon.ca. Best large-screen MacBook for Canadians.
